criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking the backdrop (outside the modal dialog) closes the modal
criteriaResults.evidence: Playwright test clicked at (10,10) on backdrop; dialog became invisible after close animation.

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking inside the modal dialog does NOT close the modal
criteriaResults.evidence: Clicked inside modal body and header text; dialog remained visible both times.
Tabbed 10 times; focus remained inside dialog.
Header, Body, Footer all visible with correct content.

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. The pointer-events-none fix on the backdrop overlay div correctly resolves the backdrop click issue while preserving all other modal functionality (escape key, focus trap, animations, compound components, accessibility).
